prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `2e65ae53`.
codex_response:
Implemented ARC2 task package `2e65ae53`. The rule is: detect every border-colored rectangle that has one full horizontal divider and one full vertical divider, infer the canonical color for each of the four quadrant positions from the partially filled frames, then fill every frame’s quadrants with those shared position colors. I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint, and discarded the `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` hint because its “paired template rectangles” reading does not match the official examples; the task is a single global quadrant-color mapping, not pairwise copying. No new shared primitive was needed.

Key files are [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2e65ae53/__init__.py), [verifier.py#L48](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2e65ae53/verifier.py#L48), [generator.py#L190](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2e65ae53/generator.py#L190), and [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2e65ae53/notes.md#L1). The generator matches the task family by sampling 4-6 compact “window” frames with full dividers, sparse but sufficient quadrant evidence, at least one empty frame, and a shared quadrant-role color scheme across the whole grid.

Validation passed end to end: official verifier check `3/3`, generated-example verification `1000/1000`, and the builder produced [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2e65ae53/task.json), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2e65ae53/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2e65ae53/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2e65ae53/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2e65ae53/previews/preview_03.png).
